items.question: What is DataHub?
items.answer: DataHub is a specialized financial data management platform designed for brokers and their clients. it streamlines document collection, financial reporting, and compliance management in one secure location.

items.question: How secure is my data on DataHub?
items.answer: We take security seriously. All data is encrypted at rest and in transit using industry-standard AES-256 encryption. We also support Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) to ensure your account remains protected.

items.question: Can I access DataHub on my mobile device?
items.answer: Yes, DataHub is fully responsive and can be accessed through any modern mobile browser. We also have a dedicated mobile application available for iOS and Android.

items.question: How do I reset my password?
items.answer: To reset your password, click on the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page. Follow the instructions sent to your registered email address to create a new password.

items.question: Can I add multiple users to my workspace?
items.answer: Yes, depending on your subscription plan, you can invite team members to your workspace. Administrators can manage user roles and permissions from the 'Users' section in settings.

items.question: How do I change my profile information?
items.answer: Navigate to your profile settings by clicking on your avatar in the top right corner. From there, you can update your name, contact details, and notification preferences.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express), as well as bank transfers for enterprise customers.

items.question: How can I download my invoices?
items.answer: You can view and download all your past invoices from the 'Billing' section in your workspace dashboard. Invoices are generated at the beginning of each billing cycle.

items.question: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
items.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. Your access will remain active until the end of your current billing period, after which your account will transition to a free tier or be deactivated.

items.question: The application is running slowly. What should I do?
items.answer: First, ensure you have a stable internet connection. If the issue persists, try clear your browser cache or opening DataHub in an Incognito/Private window. If it still doesn't resolve, please contact our support team.

items.question: How do I report a bug?
items.answer: You can report bugs through the Help & Support form on this page. Please include as much detail as possible, including steps to reproduce the issue and your browser/OS version.

items.question: Do you have an API for integration?
items.answer: Yes, we offer a comprehensive REST API for enterprise customers. You can find the API documentation in the 'Developer' section of our main website.
